headline: Named farms. Real families. A grocery model that cuts out the middlemen.
subhead: FarmThru is raising through equity crowdfunding on Birchal. Here is how the business works and why it matters.
hero_copy:
FarmThru is a farm-direct grocery store with a hub-and-collect model. We connect regenerative farms across NSW directly to families through our Brookvale hub, cutting out unnecessary middlemen.

The food is fresher. The farmers earn more. And for the first time, everyday investors can own a piece of it through equity crowdfunding on Birchal.

sections.heading: The model
sections.body:
Farmers send their products straight to our Brookvale hub. Families order online and collect Monday to Friday. Zero wholesalers. Zero cold-storage warehousing. The supply chain is short enough that food arrives days after it leaves the farm, not weeks.

This is not a meal kit or a box you cannot change. It is on-demand grocery ordering with no lock-in. Families choose what they want from named farms: Rachel's Farm, Bundarra Farm, Collins Wild Caught, Paris Creek, Farmer Brown, and more. No middlemen. No wholesalers. Sydney families collect from the Brookvale hub.
proof: Brookvale hub operating Monday to Friday
Zero wholesalers in the supply chain

sections.heading: The market
sections.body:
The Australian grocery market is worth an estimated $130 billion. Direct-to-consumer food is one of its fastest growing segments, with industry reports citing roughly 24% year-on-year growth.

Families increasingly want to know where their food comes from, how it was raised, and who grew it. FarmThru sits at the intersection of these trends: regenerative agriculture, direct supply chains, and full transparency on provenance.

sections.heading: The terms
sections.body:
Equity crowdfunding on Birchal, launching mid-2026. Minimum investment: $50. Maximum: $10,000 per investor. VIP deposit: $5, fully refundable, for first access and priority updates.

Investing in early-stage businesses carries real risk. You could lose some or all of your investment. All details, financials, and risks will be in the disclosure document on Birchal. Consider seeking independent financial advice before making any investment decision. We can't promise returns — early-stage investing carries real risk.

sections.heading: Compliance
sections.body: This is a pre-registration page for an upcoming equity crowdfunding campaign. No money is being raised at this stage. Any future offer will be made via a disclosure document on Birchal. This is not financial advice. Consider seeking independent financial advice before making any investment decision.

creative_brief: Hero: clean data-led design with the business model illustrated simply (farm to hub to family). Below-fold: market context, named farm partner map of NSW, team photos, Birchal badge. Professional but warm. Substance over sizzle.
